ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High-quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: High-quality text-based PDF, 2 pages. All fields clearly legible.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-26D-466198' does not constitute an LC reference. No fields labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar are present.

consignor_search_all_files.notes: The invoice header/branding shows 'Tetra Pak'. The 'From:' field states 'Inventing SE'. The postal address shows 'Tetra Pak Global Supply SA, CH / 1009 PULLY'. The consignor name 'Tetra Pak Inventing AB' is partially identifiable: 'Tetra Pak' appears in the header branding, and 'Inventing' appears in the 'From:' field as 'Inventing SE'. The full legal name 'Tetra Pak Inventing AB' does not appear as a single string in the invoice.

criteria_met: Consignor partially identifiable via Tetra Pak branding and 'Inventing SE' in From field (criterion 2 - koncernstruktur 4.1.0)
Consignee 'Tetra Pak Binh Duong Joint Stock Co' identifiable as 'Tetra Pak Binh Duong JSC' in invoice Buyer/Ship to/Consignee fields (criterion 3)
pairing_validation.motivation: At least two of the three pairing criteria are met: consignor is identifiable in the invoice (via Tetra Pak branding + Inventing SE) and consignee matches. Document pairing is valid.

consignor.certificate_value: Tetra Pak Inventing AB, Tanumsvägen 4, SE-457 40, FJÄLLBACKA, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: From: Inventing SE; Header: Tetra Pak; Postal address: Tetra Pak Global Supply SA, PO Box 446, CH / 1009 PULLY

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Tetra Pak Inventing AB' anywhere in all invoice pages.
comparison_steps.result: The exact full legal name 'Tetra Pak Inventing AB' does not appear as a single string in the invoice. However, 'Tetra Pak' appears in the invoice header/branding, and 'Inventing SE' appears in the 'From:' field. The combination 'Tetra Pak Inventing' is identifiable across these two locations. Proceed to sequential prövning 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6.

comparison_steps.description: Check if the certificate's consignor name 'Tetra Pak Inventing AB' can be identified as the same legal party in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: The invoice header shows 'Tetra Pak' (branding). The 'From:' field shows 'Inventing SE'. The postal address shows 'Tetra Pak Global Supply SA'. The exact name 'Tetra Pak Inventing AB' is not present as a single string. However, the combination of 'Tetra Pak' (header) and 'Inventing SE' (From field) together form a reference that is identifiable as the consignor. 'Inventing SE' clearly refers to the Inventing entity in Sweden (SE = Sweden). Re-examining under 4.1.0: The consignor's core name components 'Tetra Pak' and 'Inventing' both appear in the invoice. Proceed to further rules.

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.3.9 Consignor as invoice issuer without explicit seller address
comparison_steps.description: Check if consignor name can be identified as invoice issuer/branding and land corroboration exists.
comparison_steps.result: The invoice header/branding shows 'Tetra Pak'. The 'From:' field shows 'Inventing SE' which explicitly references the Inventing entity in SE (Sweden). The 'Country of origin of goods' field shows 'SE'. The item-level 'Origin SE' confirms Swedish origin. These are land-corroborating elements consistent with the certificate's consignor country (Sweden). No contradicting information exists. However, this rule gives MANUAL_REVIEW, not MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: The invoice 'From:' field contains 'Inventing SE'. This is a direct reference to the Tetra Pak Inventing entity in Sweden. Combined with 'Tetra Pak' in the header branding, the consignor's identity is expressed in the invoice through the combination of the corporate brand name and the entity-specific identifier. Under rule 4.1.0, the consignor name need not appear as a single contiguous string - it must be 'uttryckligen' (expressly) identifiable. 'Inventing SE' in the From field directly identifies the Inventing Sweden entity, and this falls under the Tetra Pak corporate group as shown by the shared 'Tetra Pak' branding.
comparison_steps.result: Under 4.1.0, the consignor 'Tetra Pak Inventing AB' can be identified: 'Tetra Pak' appears in the invoice header, and 'Inventing SE' appears in the From field. These together expressly identify the consignor. The 'From:' field is a sender-identification block. Land verification: SE in 'Inventing SE' corresponds to Sweden. Country of origin 'SE' further corroborates. MATCH under 4.1.0.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name expressly identifiable in invoice
rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - 'Tetra Pak' in header branding and 'Inventing SE' in From field together identify the consignor 'Tetra Pak Inventing AB'
'Inventing SE' in From field identifies Sweden. 'Origin SE' and 'Country of origin of goods: SE' further corroborate.

rules_applied.description: Abbreviation of legal form - AB omitted in invoice
rules_applied.outcome: The invoice uses 'Inventing SE' without 'AB'; this is a permitted variation in legal form representation.

evidence.location: Country of origin of goods field

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Tetra Pak Inventing AB, Tanumsvägen 4, SE-457 40, FJÄLLBACKA, Sweden'. The invoice is issued by 'Tetra Pak Global Supply SA' (a Swiss entity in the Tetra Pak group) but the 'From:' field explicitly states 'Inventing SE', directly identifying the Tetra Pak Inventing entity in Sweden. The invoice header branding shows 'Tetra Pak'. Under rule 4.1.0, the consignor name is expressly identifiable in the invoice: 'Tetra Pak' appears in the branding and 'Inventing SE' in the From field, which together identify the same legal entity. Land: 'SE' in 'Inventing SE' corresponds to Sweden, confirmed by 'Country of origin of goods: SE'. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because the invoice issuer is 'Tetra Pak Global Supply SA' in Switzerland, not 'Tetra Pak Inventing AB' in Sweden
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Under rule 4.1.0, the consignor need not be the invoice issuer. The consignor 'Tetra Pak Inventing AB' is expressly identifiable in the invoice through 'Tetra Pak' (header) and 'Inventing SE' (From field). This is a koncernstruktur case where the From field explicitly identifies the sending entity.

consignee.certificate_value: Tetra Pak Binh Duong Joint Stock Co, No. 12, VSIP II-A, Street No. 30, Vietnam – Singapore Industrial Park, Vinh Tan Ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
consignee.invoice_value: Buyer: Tetra Pak Binh Duong JSC, No. 12, VSIP II-A, Street No. 30, Vietnam-Singapore Industrial Park II-A, Vinh Tan Ward, HO CHI MINH CITY, VIETNAM, VIET NAM

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: The invoice has a 'Buyer' field with 'Tetra Pak Binh Duong JSC'. This is the primary billing/factoring party. Additionally, dedicated 'Consignee' and 'Ship to' fields all show the same party: 'Tetra Pak Binh Duong JSC'.

'JSC' is a standard abbreviation of 'Joint Stock Company' / 'Joint Stock Co'. This is a permitted legal form abbreviation under 4.1.3.6. The core name 'Tetra Pak Binh Duong' is identical in both documents.
'Vietnam' and 'VIET NAM' are the same country after normalization. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Consignee verification against invoice buyer/consignee fields
rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - Tetra Pak Binh Duong JSC found in Buyer, Ship to, and Consignee fields
Permitted abbreviation. JSC = Joint Stock Company/Co.

evidence.raw_text: Tetra Pak Binh Duong Joint Stock Co

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Tetra Pak Binh Duong Joint Stock Co' in Vietnam. Invoice Buyer, Ship to, and Consignee fields all show 'Tetra Pak Binh Duong JSC' in Vietnam. 'JSC' is a standard abbreviation of 'Joint Stock Co' per rule 4.1.3.6. Core name 'Tetra Pak Binh Duong' is identical. Address components match (No. 12, VSIP II-A, Street No. 30, Vietnam-Singapore Industrial Park, Vinh Tan Ward, Ho Chi Minh City). Country: Vietnam = VIET NAM. MATCH.

goods_description.invoice_value: Art No R3103-158, K40(Film LD/EAA 40my)width 1585mm, Width 1585 mm, Customer Material No. R3103-158

comparison_steps.description: Certificate article number R3103-158 vs invoice Art No R3103-158.
comparison_steps.result: Exact match. R3103-158 = R3103-158. Additionally confirmed by 'Customer Material No. R3103-158' in invoice.
Certificate: 'K40(Film LD/EAA 40my)width 1585mm'. Invoice: 'K40(Film LD/EAA 40my)width 1585mm'. Exact text match after normalization.

rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - R3103-158 exactly matches in both documents
MATCH - 'K40(Film LD/EAA 40my)width 1585mm' identical in both documents

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'K40(Film LD/EAA 40my)width 1585mm, 14 Pallets film R3103-158'. Invoice: Art No 'R3103-158', Description 'K40(Film LD/EAA 40my)width 1585mm'. Priority 1 (article number): R3103-158 matches exactly. Priority 2 (text matching): Product description 'K40(Film LD/EAA 40my)width 1585mm' is identical in both documents. MATCH.

quantity.invoice_value: Gross weight 15,999.868 KG; Total Pallets 14 Pallets

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'Gross 15999,86 kg'. This is the primary verification quantity.
comparison_steps.result: Primary quantity: Gross 15999.86 kg (after normalizing comma to period as decimal separator).

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate Gross 15999.86 kg with invoice Gross weight 15,999.868 KG.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 15999.86 kg. Invoice: 15,999.868 KG. After removing thousands separator (4.4.3.3): invoice value is 15999.868 KG. Applying truncation rule: truncating 15999.868 to 2 decimal places gives 15999.86. This matches certificate value exactly. MATCH per truncation rule.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate Box 6: '14 Pallets'. Invoice: 'Total Pallets Reels and Cartons: 14 Pallets'.
comparison_steps.result: 14 Pallets matches exactly. Additional verification support.

rules_applied.outcome: Gross 15999.86 kg from Box 7 used as primary verification quantity

rules_applied.description: Verification of numeric value against invoice with truncation

rules_applied.outcome: Invoice '15,999.868' normalized to 15999.868 by removing thousands separator comma
14 Pallets verified against invoice 'Total Pallets: 14 Pallets'

evidence.location: Total Pallets Reels and Cartons field

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7: 'Gross 15999,86 kg'. Invoice: 'Gross weight 15,999.868 KG'. Step 1: Normalize thousands separator in invoice (rule 4.4.3.3): '15,999.868' → 15999.868. Step 2: Apply truncation rule: 15999.868 truncated to 2 decimals = 15999.86. Step 3: Compare: 15999.86 (cert) = 15999.86 (invoice truncated). MATCH. Additionally, certificate mentions '14 Pallets' in Box 6, confirmed by invoice 'Total Pallets: 14 Pallets'. Weight category: Certificate states 'Gross', invoice states 'Gross weight'. Consistent. Unit: both kg/KG. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Truncation of decimals is a permitted normalization. Invoice value 15999.868 truncated to certificate's precision (2 decimals) = 15999.86. Exact match after truncation.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Country of origin of goods: SE; Origin SE (per item)

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin field in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has explicit field 'Country of origin of goods: SE' and per-item 'Origin SE'. Both present.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'SE'. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden.
comparison_steps.result: Sweden = SE after ISO code normalization. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in dedicated origin field
rules_applied.outcome: 'Country of origin of goods: SE' and 'Origin SE' found in invoice

rules_applied.description: Country name normalization - Sweden ↔ SE (ISO alpha-2)

evidence.location: Country of origin of goods field

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Country of origin of goods: SE' and per-item 'Origin SE'. SE is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for Sweden. Normalization under rule 4.5.4 permits matching full country name with ISO code. Sweden = SE. Only one origin country in certificate and only one in invoice. No contradictions. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate
Consignor identifiable in invoice (Tetra Pak header + Inventing SE), consignee identifiable (Tetra Pak Binh Duong JSC in Buyer/Consignee fields)

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Koncernstruktur - consignor expressly identifiable in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.details: Tetra Pak in header branding, Inventing SE in From field
Full legal name not present as single string, resolved via 4.1.0
AB omitted in invoice 'Inventing SE'; JSC ↔ Joint Stock Co for consignee
Buyer field is primary; also confirmed in Consignee and Ship to fields

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Country of origin normalization - ISO code

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Tetra Pak Inventing AB kan identifieras i fakturan, mottagaren Tetra Pak Binh Duong överensstämmer, varubeskrivning och artikelnummer matchar exakt, bruttovikt stämmer, och ursprungsland Sverige bekräftas av fakturans uppgift 'SE'. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
notes: Invoice is issued by Tetra Pak Global Supply SA (Switzerland) but the 'From:' field identifies 'Inventing SE' as the sending entity, consistent with certificate consignor Tetra Pak Inventing AB (Sweden).
Certificate gross weight 15999,86 kg verified against invoice 15,999.868 KG via truncation normalization.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Tetra Pak Inventing AB, Tanumsvägen 4, SE-457 40, FJÄLLBACKA, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Header: Tetra Pak; From: Inventing SE; Postal: Tetra Pak Global Supply SA, CH/1009 PULLY
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor uttryckligen identifierbar i fakturan via 'Tetra Pak' i header och 'Inventing SE' i From-fältet. Juridisk bolagsform AB omitterad (4.1.3.6). Land SE = Sweden via indirekt identifierare (4.1.2.1).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Tetra Pak Inventing AB' kan identifieras i fakturan genom att 'Tetra Pak' förekommer i fakturans sidhuvud/varumärke och 'Inventing SE' förekommer i From-fältet. Dessa tillsammans identifierar uttryckligen den juridiska parten. 'SE' i 'Inventing SE' verifierar landet Sverige. Ingen motsägelse i fakturan.

sections.certificate_value: Tetra Pak Binh Duong Joint Stock Co, No. 12, VSIP II-A, Street No. 30, Vietnam – Singapore Industrial Park, Vinh Tan Ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
sections.invoice_value: Buyer/Consignee/Ship to: Tetra Pak Binh Duong JSC, No. 12, VSIP II-A, Street No. 30, Vietnam-Singapore Industrial Park II-A, Vinh Tan Ward, HO CHI MINH CITY, VIETNAM, VIET NAM
sections.rule_applied: Förkortning av juridisk bolagsform (4.1.3.6): 'Joint Stock Co' ↔ 'JSC'. Landnormalisering: Vietnam = VIET NAM.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'Tetra Pak Binh Duong Joint Stock Co' identifieras i fakturans Buyer-, Consignee- och Ship to-fält som 'Tetra Pak Binh Duong JSC'. Kärnnamnet 'Tetra Pak Binh Duong' är identiskt. 'JSC' är vedertagen förkortning av 'Joint Stock Co'. Land: Vietnam = VIET NAM efter normalisering.

sections.invoice_value: Art No R3103-158, K40(Film LD/EAA 40my)width 1585mm, Width 1585 mm, Customer Material No. R3103-158
sections.rule_applied: Artikelnummer (Prioritet 1, 4.3.2): R3103-158 exakt matchning. Kontrollerad textmatchning (Prioritet 2, 4.3.3): produktbeskrivning identisk.
sections.motivation: Artikelnummer R3103-158 matchar exakt mellan certifikat och faktura. Produktbeskrivning 'K40(Film LD/EAA 40my)width 1585mm' är identisk i båda dokumenten. Fullständig matchning.

sections.invoice_value: Gross weight 15,999.868 KG; Total Pallets 14 Pallets
sections.rule_applied: Huvudregel (4.4.3) med trunkering av decimaler och tusentalsavskiljarnormalisering (4.4.3.3). Försändelsekvantitet (4.4.3.2).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt 15999,86 kg jämförs med fakturans 15,999.868 KG. Efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare (15999.868) och trunkering till 2 decimaler (15999.86) erhålls exakt matchning. Viktkategori: Gross i båda dokumenten. Enhet: kg = KG. Dessutom bekräftas 14 Pallets i fakturan.

sections.invoice_value: Country of origin of goods: SE; Origin SE
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' verifieras mot fakturans 'Country of origin of goods: SE' och 'Origin SE'. SE är ISO 3166-1 alpha-2-koden för Sweden. Entydigt ursprung, ingen motsägelse.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.85. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. No MISMATCH found.
